creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-UPDATE-NO MAINTAINER : net/p5-SNMP_Session 0.75 -> 0.83

According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/ports@freebsd.org.html

the port net/p5-SNMP_Session has an unfetchable distfile.  After some looking
around I saw that their was a newer version and the that the old distfile
had been moved.  Below is a patch that updates the port, makes use of
PERL_CONFIGURE and also beats it silly to make it respect PREFIX.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN p5-SNMP_Session p5-SNMP_Session.new
From : /usr/ports/net
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/p5-SNMP_Session.diff
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
